member.name: T:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources.pause
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.IO.UnmanagedMemoryStream similar to System.IO.MemoryStream.

member.name: P:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources.powerup
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.IO.UnmanagedMemoryStream similar to System.IO.MemoryStream.

member.name: P:ChatSMB.My.Resources.Resources.star_regular
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Icon similar to (Icon).

member.name: M:ChatSMB.ChatSMB.TxtSend_GotFocus(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: request text field focus event handler

member.name: M:ChatSMB.ChatSMB.Send
member.summary: Send a message to the LLM

member.name: M:ChatSMB.ChatSMB.GetApiKey
member.summary: Get the API Key from session

member.name: M:ChatSMB.ChatGptClient.SendMessageAsync(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Send the message to the LLM

member.name: M:ChatSMB.ChatGptClient.PlayErrorSound
member.summary: Plays a wav file when something goes amiss.
